Glp.//: Set BaseUrl to the GLP service URL reachable FROM the Windows Server. This file is the single source for non-secret production config; only the secret ApiKey comes from the environment.
Glp.//ApiKey: Secret for the Ship endpoint ONLY (Rate is public). Do NOT commit a real value here — supply it on the server via the Glp__ApiKey env var (see web.config / DEPLOYMENT.md).

Legacy.//: Base URL of the RELOCATED legacy Routing.svc origin, reachable FROM the Windows Server. Must NOT resolve back to this adapter (pds.gdnparcel.com) or pass-through will loop. Overridable via the Legacy__BaseUrl env var.
